Bra1sed Cod w1th Wh1te W1ne

(OCR CORRUPTION: digit for letter, hyphenation)

lngredients:

800g cod fillets (or so1e)
300m1 wh1te w1ne (dry)
2 onions, sliced
4 cloves garl-ic, m1nced
200g mushshrooms, sliced
100m1 f1sh broth
3 tbsp ol1ve oil
2 tbsp but-ter
1 tbsp d1ll (fresh or dried)
lemon, juiced
sa1t and pepper to taste
bay leaf

lnstructions:

1. Heat ol1ve oil 1n a large pan. Brown cod filets on both s1des, 3-4 m1nutes each.
2. Remove cod and set as1de.
3. 1n the same pan, sauté onions and garl1c for 5 m1nutes.
4. Add mushrooms, cook 4-5 more m1nutes.
5. Deglaze pan w1th wh1te w1ne, scraping up brown b1ts.
6. Add fish broth, bay leaf, and lemon ju1ce.
7. Return cod to pan, reduce heat to medium-low.
8. S1mmer for 12-15 m1nutes unt1l cod flakes eas1ly.
9. St1r in butter and fresh d1ll.
10. Season w1th salt and pepper.

Serve w1th roasted potatoes and crusty bread.
